GlobalMarketTrends  MarketGrowth(%)  MajorCompetitors  ProductionCapacity  R&DInvestment  CustomerSegments  RegulatoryChanges  EmergingTechnologies  Total
In the UAV Revenue Analysis for Raytheon Technologies, covering the period ending December 2023 and expressed in CHF,
the table presents a comprehensive overview of financial metrics across various segments. The Defense UAVs segment shows
an amount of $150.0M for 2023, reflecting a year-over-year change of 7.1%, with a revenue contribution of $7.1M in Defense
Systems and $5.5M in Commercial Drones, resulting in a market share of 45.0% in 2023, up from 42.0% in 2022, and
contributing to a total revenue of $30.0M compared to $29.0M in the prior year. In contrast, the Commercial Drones segment
reported $75.0M in 2023, also showing a year-over-year change of 7.1%, with $7.1M attributed to Defense Systems and $6.5M
to Commercial Drones, achieving a market share of 25.0% in 2023, slightly increasing from 24.0% in 2022, and generating a
total revenue of $15.0M, up from $14.0M in 2022. The Total UAV Revenue, aggregating both segments, reached $225.0M in
2023, marking a year-over-year change of 7.1%, with $7.1M from Defense Systems and $6.0M from Commercial Drones,
resulting in a market share of 70.0% in 2023, compared to 66.0% in 2022, and culminating in total revenues of $45.0M, up
from $43.0M in the previous year. The Global Market Trends section reflects a Market Growth of unspecified percentage,
identifies Major Competitors in the field, evaluates Production Capacity metrics, and highlights R&D Investment strategies,
while also addressing various Customer Segments, noting relevant Regulatory Changes, and recognizing the potential impact of
Emerging Technologies on the market landscape.
